name: Venty Cooling Unit
summary: The Venty Cooling Unit improves your vaping experience.
description: The Venty Cooling Unit improves your vaping experience. Its specialized design effectively cools down vapour, providing increased comfort during inhalation. Thanks to its unique screen, you can enjoy a purer vapour without the risk of overheating. Be prepared for extended vape sessions by keeping an extra cooling unit on hand for when it's time to deep-clean the original. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
